work_unit: ES-L003: autonomous-loop.sh PROMPT shell escape for WORKSPACE path
situation: audit-2026-07-04-001 finding ES-L003 (priority 10, route-fix): autonomous-loop.sh L82 embeds $WORKSPACE via shell interpolation inside single-quoted PROMPT string. Paths containing single quotes or other shell metacharacters would break prompt syntax (truncation or injection). Remediation: use printf %q to produce shell-safe escaped copy before embedding.
action: Added `printf -v WORKSPACE_ESCAPED "%q" "$WORKSPACE"` before PROMPT assignment; replaced `$WORKSPACE` with `$WORKSPACE_ESCAPED` in PROMPT line referencing scout-scan --workspace argument. bash -n validated syntax OK. Committed via opt-worktree.sh (direction-shift auto-detected due to scripts/autonomous-loop.sh being listed in public-interfaces.txt).
outcome_evidence: bash -n returned 0 after edit; opt-worktree.sh commit succeeded and pushed to origin/auto/opt-autonomous-loop-shift-1783104688; direction-shift triggered automatically because scripts/autonomous-loop.sh is a public interface file.

audit_findings.finding: PROMPT string embeds $WORKSPACE via shell interpolation inside single-quoted heredoc-style assignment. Path with single quote breaks PROMPT syntax.
audit_findings.remediation: Use printf %q to generate shell-safe escaped copy before embedding.
